name: Artichoke Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 6-oz jar marinated artichoke hearts, drained and coarsely chopped
1 red pepper, cut into 1-inch long, thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch quiche dish or pie plate with the crust. Refrigerate.
2. Cook the bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned. Reduce the heat to medium, then add the onion, scallions, garlic, and red pepper. Cook until the vegetables are softened, about 10 minutes.
3. Add the artichoke hearts. Cook for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the parsley, basil, salt, and pepper.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Sprinkle the Swiss cheese and Parmesan over the crust.
7. Top with the artichoke mixture.
8. Whisk together the eggs, mustard, heavy cream, light cream, nutmeg, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
9. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the artichokes in the crust.
10. Bake until puffed and set, about 45 minutes. Serve warm or at room temperature.
